MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-01-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT LISA ABBOUD, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA INTERETHNICA, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. FIRST, THE MOTION LACKS A SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED FACTS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 437C(B)(1) AND CRC 3.1350. SECOND, THE DEFENDANT CORPORATION (INTERETHNICA, INC.) IS IMPROPERLY ATTEMPTING TO APPEAR IN THIS ACTION IN PRO PER. IT IS WELL ESTABLISHED THAT A CORPORATION NEEDS TO APPEAR THROUGH COUNSEL. SEE CARESSA CAMILLE, INC. V. ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGE CONTROL APPEALS BD. (2002) 99 CAL.APP.4TH 1094, 1101. THIRD, THE MOTION FAILS ON THE MERITS. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO SUBSTANTIVELY MAINTAIN THEIR INITIAL SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN. DEFENDANTS DO NOT ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS LACK MERIT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JOHN STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR #11185
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-02-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JUNGLE COMMUNICATIONS, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE INTERETHNICA, INC'S ANSWER TO COMPLAINT- THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERETHNICA, INC. ON FEBRUARY 14, 2014 IS GRANTED, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO OBTAIN COUNSEL AND FILE AN AMENDED ANSWER WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THE FAILURE TO OBTAIN COUNSEL MAY RESULT IN A DEFAULT BEING ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT INTERETHNICA, INC. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976 =302/MJM

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF JUNGLE COMMUNICATIONS, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE INTERETHNICA, INC'S ANSWER TO COMPLAINT- The motion to strike the answer to complaint filed by Defendant Interethnica, Inc. on February 14, 2014 is granted, with leave to amend to obtain counsel and file an amended answer within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. The failure to obtain counsel may result in a default being entered against defendant Interethnica, Inc. No opposition was filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/mjm

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT LISA ABBOUD, individually and dba INTERETHNICA, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. First, the motion lacks a separate statement of undisputed facts in compliance with CCP 437c(b)(1) and CRC 3.1350. Second, the defendant corporation (Interethnica, Inc.) is improperly attempting to appear in this action in pro per. It is well established that a corporation needs to appear through counsel. See Caressa Camille, Inc. v. Alcoholic Beverage Control Appeals Bd. (2002) 99 Cal.App.4th 1094, 1101. Third, the motion fails on the merits. Defendants fail to substantively maintain their initial summary judgment burden. Defendants do not establish that plaintiff's claims lack merit. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 =(302/JKS)
